textByHash.031fba6e79d85f6da6f5fa950f86fce956b7093d: I'm keeping watch on who comes and goes from the construction platform.
textByHash.9ed44f09b5b67ec6ab26cf8f561be47fd2ec40bf: There's a large scale construction project taking place offshore.
textByHash.003dd3cd8e6422783deee9e085ac72cb8c2b9bfa: I'm afraid only authorised personnel are allowed to visit the platform.
textByHash.516f9d699c3621f7bce6c895bcaa1899f6f82309: Yes, sir. The engineers needed a large open space to construct the fleet, an offshore platform was the obvious solution.
